evidenceBoundary: Static checks do not verify runtime effects, protocol compatibility or persistence round trips.

scenarios.title: Level, premium and promotion gates
setup: Create characters at levels 50 and 51
Cover promoted/unpromoted and premium/free combinations
assertions: Only level 51+ promoted premium characters can use the Wheel
Denied characters receive a non-usable payload

scenarios.title: Base points per level
setup: Create level 51, 100 and 1000 promoted premium characters
assertions: Available base points equal level minus 50

scenarios.title: Promotion Scroll accumulation and idempotency
setup: Give all five Promotion Scrolls
assertions: The five scrolls grant exactly 50 points
Repeated use grants no additional points
State persists

scenarios.title: The Way of the Monk quest bonus
setup: Use Monk before and after all required shrines
actions: Open the Wheel and compare point totals
assertions: Completed quest grants exactly the configured 10 points
Other vocations receive no Monk quest points

scenarios.title: Hunting Task Shop points
setup: Acquire each Hunting Task Shop promotion-point reward up to the documented maximum
assertions: Rewards add spendable points
Total from this source cannot exceed 50
Repeated acquisition is prevented

scenarios.title: Grade IV permanent Promotion Points
setup: Upgrade representative Basic and Supreme Mods to Grade IV
assertions: Each fully enhanced mod grants one spendable permanent point
A point is granted only once per mod
The point is not injected independently into every domain threshold

scenarios.title: All 36 slice adjacency rules
setup: Prepare enough points for every boundary
actions: Attempt every valid and invalid transition from the center to the outer ring
assertions: Only fully connected predecessor slices unlock a target
All intended edges are reachable
No duplicate check hides a missing edge

scenarios.title: Temple-only point decrease
setup: Save a non-empty Wheel preset
actions: Try decreasing points outside a temple
Try again in the character's temple range
assertions: Outside temple only increases are accepted
Inside temple increases and decreases are accepted
Server rejects forged decrease packets outside temple

scenarios.title: Domain thresholds and stage transitions
setup: Prepare domain totals at 249/250, 499/500 and 999/1000
actions: Save each configuration and trigger recalculation
assertions: Stages activate exactly at 250, 500 and 1000
Stage state is removed when points fall below a threshold

scenarios.title: Maximum 225 revealed gems
setup: Prepare 226 revealable gems and sufficient money
actions: Reveal gems up to and beyond the limit
assertions: The 226th reveal is rejected without consuming resources
Removing a gem frees exactly one slot

scenarios.title: Reveal operation atomicity
setup: Inject failures after money validation and after item validation
actions: Attempt reveal under each failure condition
assertions: Money and gem item are either both consumed or both retained
No partially persisted revealed gem exists

scenarios.title: Affinity rotation and costs
setup: Prepare Lesser, Regular and Greater revealed gems
assertions: Rotation follows the clockwise domain order
Locked gems cannot rotate

scenarios.title: Vessel Resonance slot activation and damage/healing bonus
setup: Socket each gem quality with 0..3 matching resonances
actions: Measure active mods, damage and healing
assertions: Mod slots activate in order
Full Lesser/Regular/Greater resonance grants +1/+1/+2 damage and healing
Mismatched affinity gives no bonus

scenarios.title: Basic and Supreme upgrade costs
setup: Prepare fragments and gold for every grade
actions: Upgrade Basic and Supreme Mods through Grade IV
assertions: Basic costs match 2m/5m/30m and 5/15/30 fragments
Supreme costs match 5m/12.5m/75m and 5/15/30 fragments
Failed upgrades consume nothing

scenarios.title: Previous-slot grade gating
setup: Create Regular and Greater gems with later slots above earlier-slot grades
assertions: Each slot benefits from no grade higher than the previous slot's effective grade

scenarios.title: Grade IV modifier scaling
setup: Select representative resistance, stat and spell modifiers
actions: Compare Grade I and Grade IV effects
assertions: Applicable Grade IV bonuses are exactly 50% above Grade I
Integer rounding is defined and consistent

scenarios.title: Cooldown augmentation Momentum
setup: Prepare cooldown augment mods at each grade
actions: Trigger eligible spells repeatedly under deterministic RNG
assertions: Higher grade does not further reduce the fixed cooldown amount
Higher grades grant the expected Momentum chance

scenarios.title: Revelation Mastery applies once
setup: Socket one Revelation Mastery Supreme Mod with three resonances
assertions: The modifier contributes its configured Revelation points exactly once per active gem
Repeated recalculation does not accumulate the bonus

scenarios.title: Complete save/load round trip
setup: Create points, scrolls, revealed/active gems, locks and mod grades
actions: Save, logout, restart server if possible, login
assertions: Every field round-trips exactly
Destroyed gems do not reappear
Active gem UUIDs resolve to existing revealed gems

scenarios.title: Canary and compatible OTClient payload contract
setup: Capture official-profile and legacy-profile Wheel payloads
actions: Open, save, reveal, rotate, lock, socket and upgrade through the client
assertions: Opcode, field order, widths, counts and feature gates match on both sides
Malformed indexes and counts are rejected server-side
